name: Amy Rose (Movie Version)
description:
Coming from the alien planet of Mobius, this incredibly cute and very pink hedgehog wields her precious Piko Piko Hammer to find a fellow hedgehog named Sonic, in order to prevent the takeover by his robotic doppelgangers. Arriving alone on Earth, Amy will have to learn to adapt to her new surroundings in search of the blue speedster.

From the Sonic the Hedgehog (Paramount Movies) franchise.

I guess this kinda counts as a spoiler for Sonic 3, but the movie's been out for awhile, and Sonic 4's already been announced with Amy being the focus, so her being the big reveal in Sonic 3 is pretty much common knowledge by now. If you didn't know about her reveal, it's kinda on you at this point.

(Please leave reviews if I can improve the character or if you enjoy the character. Your ratings give me endorphins.)

UPDATE 10/10: A lorebook has been added to include world info from the Sonic film trilogy.

RECOMMENDED BOT LINKS:

Amy Rose - The pink hedgehog and self-proclaimed girlfriend of Sonic the Hedgehog.

Blaze the Cat - Imperial princess and and guardian of the Sol Emeralds from Sonic Rush.
